summary: Justin Brennan delivers a personal development and faith-based mentorship focused on emotional discipline, masculine leadership in relationships, and spiritual growth. The entire video is autobiographical storytelling about overcoming childhood trauma, failed relationships, and building a covenant marriage—with zero discussion of multifamily real estate, deal analysis, underwriting, or market sourcing.
takeaways: Emotional discipline is 'hands-down one of the greatest skill sets anyone can learn'
Before you're a husband, you need to BE the husband to attract the right partner
Men need peace in home, supportive spouse, physical intimacy; women need to feel provided for, protected, emotionally safe
When your wife vents, ask 'Do you want my voice or my ears?' then listen without solving
Don't chase butterflies—build a beautiful garden and they come to play
Start with gratitude, ground your body outside for 5 deep breaths, play 5 songs that move you emotionally to reset your state of mind
Surrender control and realize 'God gives us the skills, it's up to us to apply it'—anything needed is already in us
title: This One Mistake Is Destroying Modern Men
